Title: I Think You Should Leave with Tim Robinson

Episodes.Director: Zach Kanin, Alice Mathias, Jeffrey Max
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Sam Richardson, Whitmer Thomas
Episodes.Plot: An unplanned meeting leads to lunchtime chaos. A prank show goes awry at the mall. The "Little Buff Boys" competition. A ghost tour guest goes too far.

Episodes.Title: They have a cake shop there Susan where the cakes just look stunning.
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Patti Harrison, Bob Odenkirk
Episodes.Plot: An office dispute over shirt patterns. A little lie about the ice cream store escalates quickly. A man suspects a baby is aware of his checkered past.

Episodes.Title: You sure about that? You sure about that that's why?

Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Bob McDuff Wilson, Brian Tichnell
Episodes.Plot: A professor really regrets his dinner order. The Carber hot dog vacuum. "Detective Crashmore." A hat has its day in court.

Episodes.Title: Everyone just needs to be more in the moment.
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, Paul Walter Hauser, Conner O'Malley
Episodes.Plot: An offhanded joke leaves a husband guilt-ridden. An attempt to ease tensions during a trip backfires. A pants-centric website with a specific purpose.

Episodes.Title: Didn't you say there was gonna be five people at this table?
Episodes.Writer: Tim Robinson, Zach Kanin, John Solomon
Episodes.Actors: Tim Robinson, John Early, Tim Heidecker
Episodes.Plot: A novice driver in a parking lot. Defying the rules of credit card roulette. Celebrity impersonators get unruly. Date night at a cosmos-themed bar.

Episodes.Title: I need a wet paper towel.

Episodes.Plot: A mistaken identity at work. The new "Tammy Craps" doll. Some interesting instructional videos during a Driver's ed class and an attempted ear-piercing.
